name: @trashcodermaker/pi-pr-review-handler
description_en: Systematically process GitHub PR review comments: triage for validity, fix code, and post replies. Pi package — install with `pi install npm:@trashcodermaker/pi-pr-review-handler`.
description_zh: 系统处理 GitHub PR 审查评论：分类有效性、修复代码并发布回复。Pi 包 - 使用 `pi install npm:@trashcodermaker/pi-pr-review-handler` 安装。
